prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no watermarks.

A stunningly beautiful Chinese woman in her early twenties, standing with composed confidence and an aura of quiet, razor-sharp intelligence. She is extraordinarily attractive with an almost intimidating level of beauty — the kind that makes people pause mid-sentence.

Face and facial features: Oval face with elegant bone structure, high sculpted cheekbones creating refined shadow planes beneath. Porcelain-fair skin with a luminous, dewy finish — skin oil sheen at 68% gloss, faint microvascular networks visible beneath the translucent dermis around the temples and under-eye area at 0.02mm diameter, distributed at 12 capillaries per square centimeter. Flawless complexion with subtle warm undertones. Eyes are large, deep-set, and intensely dark brown — almost black — with a piercing, analytical gaze that suggests she is constantly calculating three steps ahead. Double eyelids with a natural crease, long dense black lashes casting micro-shadows on her cheeks. Her gaze carries both warmth and a guarded, watchful depth — the eyes of someone who has endured loss and transformed it into steel-cold determination. Subtle micro-expression: a faint, enigmatic near-smile at the left corner of her lips, blink cycle 1.5 seconds, nostrils with barely perceptible 0.3Hz micro-tremor. Perfectly shaped eyebrows — over 1200 individually rendered hairs at 0.08mm thickness each, growing naturally with a 12-degree upward tilt at the brow peak, groomed but not overly sculpted, conveying natural authority. Straight, refined nose with a delicate bridge. Full lips with natural gradient color deepening from lip corners to the cupid's bow across 12 tonal steps, lip texture lines at 0.05mm depth, tinted a muted rose-mauve without visible lipstick — effortlessly polished.

Hair: Long, jet-black hair reaching mid-back, sleek and straight with a subtle natural body, parted slightly off-center. The front sections are tucked behind one ear, revealing a small, minimalist platinum ear cuff on the left ear. Hair strands individually rendered with silk-like light reflection, each fiber catching cool highlights. The hair is immaculately maintained — suggesting discipline and self-control.

Build and physique: Tall and athletic with a lean, toned figure that speaks to exceptional physical fitness — long legs, straight posture, squared shoulders held with natural poise. She stands at approximately 172cm, with the balanced proportions of someone who trains rigorously but discreetly. Her posture radiates quiet dominance — spine perfectly straight, chin slightly elevated, weight evenly distributed, one hand relaxed at her side and the other lightly holding a slim black leather portfolio against her hip.

Clothing: She wears a tailored charcoal-gray wool blazer with sharp structured shoulders and a nipped waist — fabric rendered at 12μm fiber diameter, 40 threads per square centimeter weave density, subtle herringbone texture visible at close inspection. Underneath, a cream-white silk blouse with a clean mandarin-influenced collar, the silk catching light with a soft 92% translucency sheen. High-waisted black tailored trousers with a perfect straight-leg cut, pressed with razor-sharp creases. On her feet, pointed-toe black leather stilettos with a modest 7cm heel — leather surface showing 98% specular reflection with faint 0.7-intensity scratch reflections suggesting real wear. A thin platinum chain bracelet on her right wrist — minimalist, expensive, understated. No ostentatious jewelry — every detail communicates taste restrained by strategic calculation.

Lighting: Natural soft lighting at 5500K color temperature, 1100 lux illumination, shadow density at 0.15 creating barely perceptible soft gradients under the jawline and blazer lapels, global reflection intensity 0.2, even illumination preserving all micro-detail across skin, fabric, and metal surfaces.

Overall impression: She is the embodiment of a modern power heroine — devastatingly beautiful yet deliberately understated, radiating the coiled energy of someone whose true capabilities are far greater than what she allows the world to see. Every element of her appearance is a calculated choice: professional enough to blend into elite corporate environments, refined enough to command respect, and restrained enough to hide the burning ambition and painful secrets beneath. This is a woman forged by adversity into something extraordinary — standing at the threshold of reclaiming everything that was taken from her.

16K 60Hz ultra-high-definition quality, maximum sharpness at 400% zoom with zero blur, micro-level detail rendering, hyperrealistic material fidelity., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: realistic
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
